items.title: South Korean stocks weren’t a big deal in your emerging-markets fund. Artificial intelligence changed that.
items.description: Is your emerging-markets fund an accidental bet on AI? Returns for these two ETFs show why it might be.

items.title: As Micron’s stock rebounds, Morgan Stanley says investors shouldn’t get spooked by the past
items.description: Memory chips remain a bottleneck to AI development and demand looks durable, Morgan Stanley analyst says.

items.title: Forget Nvidia. These 5 S&P 500 stocks are quietly going all in on AI.
items.description: The “Mag Seven” has become the “Bag Seven.” Sharp tech investors are looking elsewhere.

items.title: SpaceX flirts with a further descent down the market-cap ranks
items.description: SpaceX has lost more than $1 trillion in market value since its peak, briefly landing it below Meta on the market-cap leaderboards.

items.title: Ranch dressing and stuffed raccoons: Spain isn’t the World Cup’s only winner
items.description: Spain beat Argentina to win the World Cup. But there were some other big victories off the field, too.

items.title: ‘I never want to manage people again.’ I’m 33. Should I leave my corporate leadership role to become an assistant?
items.description: “I just don’t care about the corporate ladder.”

items.title: Detecting cyclospora is ‘notoriously difficult.’ Here’s what the FDA’s apology to Taylor Farms means.
items.description: The FDA and CDC are investigating iceberg lettuce sold by Taylor Farms to confirm the source of the cyclospora outbreak

items.title: Iren’s stock surges as the neocloud lands $2.8 billion worth of new deals
items.description: The AI infrastructure provider is easing anxiety over high data-center build-out costs as it secures new customers and prepayments for chips.

items.title: Global oil prices dip below $87 a barrel after new Iran ceasefire proposal. Blockade on Saudi by Yemen’s Houthis keeps losses in check.
items.description: Oil prices took a dive into the red on Monday, reversing an earlier sharp rally, after a report of a 10-day ceasefire proposal between the U.S. and Iran sparked a sharp decline in energy prices

items.title: I will claim Social Security early. Why do so few people talk about the elephant in the room?
items.description: “The strongest argument for claiming benefits earlier goes beyond the traditional break-even analyses.”
